github_projects.name: catchorg/Catch2
github_projects.description: A modern, C++-native, test framework for unit-tests, TDD and BDD - using C++14, C++17 and later (C++11 support is in v2.x branch, and C++03 on the Catch1.x branch)

github_projects.name: davila7/claude-code-templates
github_projects.description: CLI tool for configuring and monitoring Claude Code

github_projects.name: google-labs-code/stitch-skills
github_projects.description: A library of Agent Skills designed to work with the Stitch MCP server. Each skill follows the Agent Skills open standard, for compatibility with coding agents such as Antigravity, Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Cursor.

github_projects.name: hashicorp/terraform
github_projects.description: Terraform enables you to safely and predictably create, change, and improve infrastructure. It is a source-available tool that codifies APIs into declarative configuration files that can be shared amongst team members, treated as code, edited, reviewed, and versioned.
